matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 0111011011 7
2 0010011011 5
3 1010000000 2
4 0010111100 5
5 1001010010 4
6 0001111000 4
7 0001101011 5

70 07 1010100000 3
